meta.project: iArchive — HCDC Digital Archival Collection System

product_overview: iArchive is a web-based OAIS-compliant archival management platform for Holy Cross of Davao College (HCDC) that digitizes, catalogs, and provides controlled access to institutional records using ISAD(G) and Dublin Core metadata standards. It supports role-based access (Admin, Archivist, Student/Public) and tools for ingesting, searching, viewing, and exporting archival materials.
core_goals: Allow users to discover and browse digitized archival materials using search, filters, and view modes
Provide full descriptive access to each archival item (multi-page viewer, ISAD(G) and Dublin Core metadata) for research and reference
Enable researchers to request access to restricted materials and for staff to review those requests
Allow administrators and archivists to ingest, edit, and export material metadata and manage collection hierarchy
Support account creation and role-based login so users receive the correct dashboard and access level

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email and password to receive a session token and be redirected to a role-specific dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Redirected to role-based dashboard on success
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field with incorrect credentials -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account by providing name, email, institution, role and password; registration remains pending until approved by an administrator.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Select institution -> Select role/user category -> Click Register button -> See confirmation that registration is pending approval
Navigate to /register -> Omit required field(s) -> Click Register button -> See validation error indicating required fields

features.name: Browse Collections
features.description: Search and filter the public archive with grid/list view options and OAIS-compliance filtering to find materials of interest.
user_flows: Navigate to /collections -> Type in search bar to filter materials by title, creator, or ID -> Toggle OAIS Only checkbox to filter compliant materials -> Click Filters button to show access level and category filters -> Select access level filter (Public/Restricted/Confidential) -> Toggle between grid and list view -> Click on a material card to open material detail view -> Clear all filters to restore full listing

features.name: View Material Detail
features.description: Inspect a single archival item's multi-page viewer, metadata (ISAD(G) and Dublin Core), related items, and download metadata; request access for restricted items.
user_flows: Navigate to /collections -> Open a material's detail view -> Navigate through page thumbnails to change pages -> Click zoom in/out to adjust view -> Click rotate to change orientation -> Click fullscreen to open document in fullscreen -> Navigate pages in fullscreen with arrows -> Switch between Details, Dublin Core, and Related Items tabs -> Click Download Metadata button to export CSV

Navigate to /collections -> Open a restricted material's detail view -> Choose to request access -> Navigate to /request-access -> Fill request form and submit -> See confirmation that access request was submitted

features.name: Request Access (Researcher)
features.description: Submit a petition to gain access to restricted or confidential materials via an access request form.
user_flows: Navigate to /request-access -> Select or describe the material and reason for access -> Fill contact and affiliation details -> Submit access request -> See confirmation that request was submitted

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Provide administrators with metadata compliance overviews, ingestion velocity, stat cards, materials table with expandable detail, and activity feed for oversight.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> View ingestion velocity chart -> View stat cards (Total Materials, Fully Described, Essential Compliance, Avg Completion) -> Click filter tabs (All, Complete, Partial, Incomplete) to change table view -> Click on a material row to expand detail panel -> View ISAD(G) area breakdown bars and essential fields checklist -> View completion rings for ISAD(G) and Dublin Core -> Scroll through activity feed

features.name: Material Ingestion
features.description: Ingest new archival materials through a guided multi-step workflow: setup item, generate page previews and OCR, set access controls, complete metadata checklist, and finalize ingest.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/collections -> Initiate new material ingest -> Select department/subfonds from hierarchy -> Select series from dropdown -> Enter material title -> Enter creator name -> Upload file (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, images, video) -> Wait for processing and page preview generation -> Review page preview thumbnails -> Navigate through previewed pages -> Select access level (Public, Restricted, Confidential) -> Enter Terms of Use text -> Review metadata checklist -> Finalize ingest -> New material appears in materials list

features.name: Export Metadata
features.description: Download metadata as CSV for individual materials or as a batch export for filtered material sets.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/collections -> Apply filters to narrow visible materials -> Click Export Metadata in admin toolbar -> Download CSV containing metadata for visible materials
Navigate to /admin/collections -> Expand an individual material row or open its admin detail view -> Click Download Metadata for the material -> Download single-item CSV

features.name: Material Search and Filter (Admin)
features.description: Search and filter materials in the admin view using text search, hierarchical tree browser, and pagination; perform row-level actions like edit, delete, and external view.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/collections -> Type in search input to filter by title, ID, or creator -> Click tree nodes in the hierarchy browser to filter by department/series -> Use pagination controls to navigate pages -> Click a material row to expand accordion detail view -> Click Edit Material on expanded material to modify metadata -> Save edits to persist changes -> Click Delete to remove a material -> Use External Link control to open the public detail view for the item

features.name: Access Request Management (Admin)
features.description: Review, approve, or reject researcher requests for access to restricted materials.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/requests -> View list of pending access requests -> Click Approve on a pending request -> Confirm approval and see request marked as approved
Navigate to /admin/requests -> View list of pending access requests -> Click Reject on a pending request -> Confirm rejection and see request marked as rejected

features.name: User Management
features.description: Manage active users and process pending registration approvals to grant system access and assign roles.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/users -> View list of active users and pending registration requests -> Click Approve on a pending user -> User moves to active users list -> Click Reject on a pending user -> Pending registration is marked rejected

features.name: Category Management
features.description: Create, edit, and delete collection categories/series used to organize the archival hierarchy.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/categories -> View list of categories -> Create a new category by providing name and description -> Save to add the category to the list -> Edit an existing category's name or description -> Save to persist changes -> Delete an existing category -> See category removed from list

features.name: Announcement Management
features.description: Create, publish/unpublish, and delete system-wide announcements for users.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/announcements -> View list of announcements -> Create an announcement by filling title and content -> Toggle active/inactive state -> Save to publish the announcement -> Delete an existing announcement when no longer needed

features.name: Splash Screen
features.description: Show an animated splash screen on first visit of a browser session before transitioning to main content.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See animated splash with progress bar on first visit of the session -> Wait for progress bar to complete -> Automatic transition to main content

routes.description: Landing page with hero, featured collections, feature cards, access levels, and CTA
Email/password login form with demo credentials support
Account registration form requiring admin approval
Public browsable archive with search, filters, grid/list view, OAIS toggle
Full material detail view with multi-page viewer, metadata tabs, access control
Form to petition access to restricted materials
Admin metadata compliance dashboard with charts, stat cards, materials table, activity feed
Full material management with hierarchy tree, ingestion workflow, metadata editing, export
Review and approve/reject material access requests
System-wide activity and audit log viewer
User management with pending registration approval
Student dashboard for browsing accessible materials

features.description: Login with email and password, receives JWT token stored in localStorage
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials
Redirected to role-based dashboard on success

features.name: User Registration

Navigate pages in fullscreen with arrows

known_limitations.issue: All data persistence uses browser localStorage, not a real database
known_limitations.impact: Data is lost if localStorage is cleared; quota limits apply for large files

known_limitations.issue: Mock API runs only in Vite dev mode, not in production builds
known_limitations.impact: All /api/* endpoints return 404 in production unless a real backend is deployed

known_limitations.issue: PDF page preview extraction limited to first 10 pages to avoid localStorage quota
known_limitations.impact: Documents with more than 10 pages only show first 10 visual thumbnails

known_limitations.issue: Admin Dashboard uses hardcoded SAMPLE_MATERIALS instead of localStorage data
known_limitations.impact: Dashboard stats do not reflect newly ingested materials, only the 6 sample items

known_limitations.issue: Audit Logs page returns empty data from mock API
known_limitations.impact: Audit log page shows no entries

known_limitations.issue: file:// workspace dependencies may fail on Vercel install step
known_limitations.impact: Vercel build may fail during pnpm install if workspace resolution is misconfigured
